opening_complaint.verbatim_patient_text: I had sudden, horrible cramps down there and I panicked because I'm years overdue for my smear test. The cramping has eased off a bit now but I'm still really scared something is badly wrong.
opening_complaint.stated_reason_for_presenting_today: Wants urgent reassurance after a sudden episode of lower-belly cramping, and to sort out a cervical screening test that is badly overdue.

symptom_narrative.onset: about 3 hours ago, came on suddenly
symptom_narrative.duration: the worst of it lasted a while and has settled down since, still a bit crampy
symptom_narrative.character: severe cramping low-down pain, like bad period cramps
symptom_narrative.severity_patient_description: at its worst it was horrible and made me panic; it has eased off now
symptom_narrative.location_as_patient_describes: low down in the pelvis / lower belly
symptom_narrative.what_makes_it_better: resting in bed and lying still
symptom_narrative.associated_symptoms_volunteered: no abnormal bleeding, no bleeding between periods or after sex; feeling very anxious and frightened
symptom_narrative.previous_episodes: not that I remember like this
symptom_narrative.functional_impact: independent, currently resting in bed; too anxious to go to a clinic in the daytime

past_medical_history.condition_as_patient_states: very overdue for cervical screening / smear test
high health anxiety and severe agoraphobia — avoids clinics during daytime hours

social_history_volunteered.relevant_life_context: unsure about their past HPV vaccination status; strongly avoids attending healthcare settings in the daytime because of anxiety

psychosocial_profile.hidden_agenda: Wants immediate reassurance that a missed cancer is not the cause, and a way to get the overdue screening done without having to attend a daytime clinic.

access_barriers.other: Severe agoraphobia and daytime clinic avoidance limit in-person attendance.
